title: ekmanianthe actinophylla
intro: Ekmanianthe actinophylla, also known as the coral tree or flame tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, skin infections, and respiratory problems, due to its antioxidant and immunomodulatory properties. Ekmanianthe actinophylla can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
